name: Michelle Lobster
alt_names: ミッシェル・ロブスター
description: First appeared in episode 128. She introduced herself as Lucy's relative, calling her "nee-san". She informs Lucy that she was instructed by her father to send the case as a memento from him to Lucy. Jude also requested for "Michelle" to search for Lucy during that 7-year gap.   ~!In truth, she is Imitatia, a member of the new Oración Seis. Her true form is a doll that Lucy once had a long time ago. Her sole desire was to be with Lucy forever.!~
